Comparison

SpiniX vs Como Sense

Different weight classes. Como Sense is an enterprise-grade engagement platform for multi-location chains with POS integration. SpiniX is a gamified loyalty tool for independent restaurants and small chains that works without any POS.

SpiniX vs Como: the short version

SpiniX vs Como: feature comparison

Como SenseSpiniX
Starting price €29/mo
Setup time 10 minutes
POS required No
Branded mobile app No (Wallet pass instead)
Apple/Google Wallet Yes
AI-powered campaigns AI campaign builder
Customer segmentation Basic (opt-in, inactive)
Loyalty mechanics Spin wheel (variable rewards)
Gamification Core mechanic on every scan
Google review generation 33% conversion rate
Automated email sequence 6-email automated flow
WhatsApp integration Yes (SEA/UK markets)
Multi-location Yes (Growth plan)
QR-based enrollment Direct scan, no app needed
Analytics depth Dashboard + weekly digest
Contract Month-to-month

SpiniX vs Como: where each wins

Como wins: enterprise CRM and AI segmentation

Como's proprietary AI analyzes customer behavior to predict spending patterns and automate targeted campaigns. You can segment by visit frequency, average spend, last visit date, and dozens of other attributes. For a 10-location chain running differentiated campaigns per location, this depth matters. SpiniX offers basic segmentation (opted-in, inactive, redeemed) but nothing close to AI-driven behavior prediction.

Como wins: branded mobile app

Como includes a fully branded mobile app with your restaurant's name in the app store. Push notifications, digital menu, loyalty card, and ordering — all under your brand. SpiniX uses Apple/Google Wallet passes instead of an app. The trade-off: apps require download (friction), Wallet passes don't. Average restaurant app has 30-day retention of 25%. Wallet passes stay on the phone indefinitely.

SpiniX wins: zero POS dependency

Como requires POS integration with Revel, MICROS, PAR, or ICRTouch. If your restaurant uses a different POS — or no POS — Como doesn't work. Setup takes days to weeks. SpiniX works with any setup: print a QR code, guests scan, done. Running in 10 minutes. This matters for independent restaurants where POS migration isn't an option.

SpiniX wins: built-in Google review generation

Como doesn't include review management. For Google reviews, you need a separate tool ($50-200/month). SpiniX builds review prompting into the reward moment — guests spin, win, feel good, get asked for a review. 33% leave one. The timing is everything. At €29/month total (loyalty + reviews), SpiniX costs less than most standalone review tools.

SpiniX wins: gamification as core mechanic

Como offers scratch cards as an add-on gamification feature. SpiniX makes gamification the entire experience. Every QR scan triggers a spin wheel — variable rewards, unpredictable outcomes, dopamine-driven engagement. The difference: Como adds gamification on top. SpiniX builds from gamification up.

SpiniX vs Como: FAQ

Can Como work without a POS?

Como is designed around POS integration. Without a compatible POS (Revel, MICROS, PAR, ICRTouch), you lose automatic transaction tracking — the foundation of their loyalty mechanics. You'd be paying enterprise prices for a platform that can't track what customers buy.

Does Como offer review generation?

No. Como focuses on loyalty, CRM, and marketing automation. For Google review management, you'd need a separate tool. SpiniX includes review generation with 33% conversion as a core feature.

Is Como worth the price for a single restaurant?

Probably not. Como's strengths — AI segmentation, multi-location orchestration, branded app — deliver the most value at scale (5+ locations). A single restaurant paying $59+/mo for Como gets analytics depth but misses the review generation and gamification that SpiniX offers at half the price.

Can SpiniX replace Como for a growing chain?

SpiniX's Pro plan supports multiple locations and wheels. For 2-5 locations, it works well. Beyond 10 locations with complex campaign needs across different demographics, Como's enterprise tools become more relevant.

Enterprise features or instant results?

Try SpiniX free for 14 days. Set up in 10 minutes. No POS required. See gamified engagement in action.

Try It — 90% Off First Month
